hub.title: Owner Services
hub.subtitle: Complete asset operation support for overseas Chinese owners
hub.intro: Eight integrated services covering management, short-term rental, furnishing, inspections, business visits, golf travel, MM2H landing, and property sales — all delivered locally in Johor Bahru.
hub.seoTitle: Property Owner Services Johor Bahru | Malaysia Property Network
hub.seoDescription: Eight owner services for overseas Chinese investors in Forest City, R&F Princess Cove, Danga Bay, and Johor Bahru.
hub.seoKeywords: Johor Bahru owner services, Forest City property, overseas Chinese Malaysia, MM2H property

propertyManagement.title: Property Management
propertyManagement.subtitle: Full-service management for overseas Chinese owners
propertyManagement.intro: Own property in Johor Bahru but live abroad? We manage tenants, maintenance, and reporting locally — so your Malaysian asset performs without you needing to fly in.
propertyManagement.seoTitle: Property Management Johor Bahru | Overseas Owner Service
propertyManagement.seoDescription: Full property management for overseas owners in Forest City, R&F Princess Cove, Danga Bay, and Johor Bahru. Bilingual reporting and local tenant operations.
propertyManagement.seoKeywords: Johor Bahru property management, Forest City management, overseas owner Malaysia, R&F Princess Cove rental
propertyManagement.whatsappMessage: Hi, I am an overseas owner interested in Property Management in Johor Bahru. Please share your service details.
targetCustomers: Overseas Chinese owners who cannot visit Malaysia regularly
Investors with units in Forest City, R&F, or Danga Bay seeking hands-off management
First-time overseas landlords who need local leasing and compliance support
Owners transitioning from self-management or unreliable agents
scope: Tenant sourcing, screening, and lease management
Rent collection and remittance to your nominated account
Maintenance coordination and emergency response
Utility and bill payment on your behalf
Monthly bilingual owner reporting
Vacancy marketing and rental price review

pricing.name: Essential
pricing.desc: Rent collection, tenant liaison, basic maintenance. Minimum RM 200/month.

pricing.name: Complete
pricing.desc: Full leasing, inspections, bill pay, monthly reporting. Most popular.

pricing.name: Premium
pricing.desc: Priority support, quarterly inspections, renovation oversight.

faq.q: How do I receive rent while living overseas?
faq.a: We collect rent locally and remit monthly to your bank account with a full statement in English or Chinese.

faq.q: Do you manage Forest City units?
faq.a: Yes. We understand Forest City strata rules, guest policies, and the tenant profile for the development.

faq.q: What if my unit is vacant?
faq.a: We activate marketing immediately with pricing review across local channels.

faq.q: Is there a minimum contract?
faq.a: Standard agreement is 12 months, renewable. Shorter onboarding may be available for transitions.

propertyManagement.ctaDescription: Tell us about your property. We reply within 24 hours in English or 中文.

steps.title: Onboarding
steps.desc: Property assessment, key collection, utility setup, and signed management agreement.

steps.title: Marketing & Leasing
steps.desc: Professional listing, tenant screening, lease execution, and deposit handling.

steps.title: Monthly Operations
steps.desc: Rent collection, bill payment, maintenance coordination, and tenant communication.

steps.title: Owner Reporting
steps.desc: Monthly income statement, expense breakdown, and condition updates in English or Chinese.

airbnbManagement.title: Airbnb Management
airbnbManagement.subtitle: Short-term rental operations without day-to-day involvement
airbnbManagement.intro: Earn from short-term rentals in Johor Bahru while living overseas. We handle guests, turnovers, and platform operations across Forest City, R&F, Danga Bay, and JB city units.
airbnbManagement.seoTitle: Airbnb Management Johor Bahru | Short-Term Rental Service
airbnbManagement.seoDescription: Airbnb and short-term rental management for overseas owners in Forest City, R&F Princess Cove, Danga Bay, and Johor Bahru.
airbnbManagement.seoKeywords: Airbnb management Johor Bahru, Forest City short-term rental, R&F Airbnb, overseas owner
airbnbManagement.whatsappMessage: Hi, I am interested in Airbnb Management for my Johor Bahru property.
targetCustomers: Overseas owners with furnished units suitable for short stays
Investors seeking higher yields than long-term tenancy in prime JB locations
Owners already on Airbnb who need local guest and cleaner coordination
Forest City or R&F owners targeting Singapore weekend travellers
scope: Listing setup and optimisation (English & Chinese)
Guest messaging, booking, and check-in coordination
Cleaner dispatch and turnover quality checks
Dynamic pricing and occupancy reporting
Review management and platform compliance checks
Multi-platform sync where applicable (Airbnb, Booking.com)

pricing.name: Coordinator
pricing.desc: Guest messaging, booking management, cleaner dispatch.

pricing.name: Full Service
pricing.desc: Listing optimisation, dynamic pricing, turnover, monthly P&L.

pricing.name: Premium Host
pricing.desc: Multi-platform sync, review management, styling advice.

faq.q: Is short-term rental allowed in my building?
faq.a: Rules vary by development. We review strata by-laws for your building before onboarding — we do not guarantee approval.

faq.q: Do I need to furnish the unit?
faq.a: Furnished units perform best. We can bundle our Furniture & Appliance Package if needed.

faq.q: Who handles cleaning?
faq.a: We manage vetted cleaning partners with photo verification after each checkout.

faq.q: What occupancy should I expect?
faq.a: Varies by location and season. CIQ-area and R&F units often perform well on weekends; Forest City peaks on holidays.

airbnbManagement.ctaDescription: Share your property details for a free revenue potential review.

furnitureAppliancePackage.title: Furniture & Appliance Package
furnitureAppliancePackage.subtitle: Turn-key furnishing for rental-ready units
furnitureAppliancePackage.intro: Need your Johor Bahru unit rental-ready without flying in? We source, deliver, and install furniture and appliances locally — with clear package pricing for overseas owners.
furnitureAppliancePackage.seoTitle: Furniture Package Johor Bahru | Rental-Ready Furnishing
furnitureAppliancePackage.seoDescription: Furniture and appliance packages for overseas owners in Forest City, R&F Princess Cove, Danga Bay, and Johor Bahru. Local procurement and installation.
furnitureAppliancePackage.seoKeywords: Johor Bahru furniture package, Forest City furnishing, rental-ready unit Malaysia
furnitureAppliancePackage.whatsappMessage: Hi, I need a Furniture & Appliance Package for my unit in Johor Bahru.
targetCustomers: Overseas buyers receiving vacant or partially fitted units
Owners preparing for first tenancy or Airbnb launch
Investors who want one local contact instead of coordinating multiple suppliers
Remote owners upgrading ageing furniture before re-leasing
scope: Package design based on unit size and rental target
Local furniture and appliance sourcing
Delivery, assembly, and installation coordination
Basic styling for listing photos
Inventory list with warranty records
Optional link to property management or Airbnb onboarding

pricing.name: Essential Studio
pricing.desc: Studio/1-bed basics: bed, sofa, dining, AC, washer hookup guidance.

pricing.name: Standard 2-Bed
pricing.desc: Full furnishing for 2-bedroom long-term or short-stay rental.

pricing.name: Premium 3-Bed
pricing.desc: Higher-spec finishes, smart lock option, photo-ready styling.

faq.q: Can you furnish Forest City units?
faq.a: Yes. We account for delivery access, resort security, and typical unit layouts in Forest City.

faq.q: How long does installation take?
faq.a: Typically 5–10 working days after package confirmation, depending on stock and unit access.

faq.q: Do you offer custom packages?
faq.a: Yes. Packages are starting references — we quote precisely after reviewing your floor plan and goals.

faq.q: Who owns the furniture?
faq.a: All items are purchased on your behalf and belong to you. We provide receipts and inventory documentation.

furnitureAppliancePackage.ctaDescription: Send your unit type and development. We reply with a package recommendation.

inspectionKeyHolding.title: Inspection & Key Holding
inspectionKeyHolding.subtitle: On-ground eyes and secure access for absentee owners
inspectionKeyHolding.intro: Cannot visit your unit? We inspect, document, and securely hold keys — coordinating access for tenants, contractors, and agents across Johor Bahru's key developments.
inspectionKeyHolding.seoTitle: Property Inspection & Key Holding Johor Bahru
inspectionKeyHolding.seoDescription: Property inspection reports and secure key holding for overseas owners in Forest City, R&F Princess Cove, Danga Bay, and Johor Bahru.
inspectionKeyHolding.seoKeywords: Johor Bahru property inspection, key holding Malaysia, Forest City inspection, overseas owner
inspectionKeyHolding.whatsappMessage: Hi, I need Property Inspection and/or Key Holding for my unit in Johor Bahru.
targetCustomers: Overseas owners who need periodic condition checks without flying in
Buyers awaiting handover or resale purchase verification
Landlords who need secure key custody and authorised access dispatch
Airbnb hosts requiring local key management for cleaners and guests
scope: Interior condition inspection with timestamped photo report
Pre-tenancy, post-renovation, and annual inspection options
Secure key and access card storage with owner authorisation log
Access dispatch for viewings, maintenance, and inspections
Optional repair quotation after inspection findings
Combined inspection + key onboarding packages

pricing.name: Basic Inspection
pricing.desc: Studio/1-bed walkthrough, 20+ photos, summary report.

pricing.name: Standard Inspection
pricing.desc: 2-bed detailed checklist, 40+ photos, recommendations.

pricing.name: Key Holding Add-On
pricing.desc: Secure storage, access log, up to 2 dispatches/month.

faq.q: Do I need to be present for inspection?
faq.a: No. We coordinate access with security or management using your authorisation.

faq.q: How fast is the report delivered?
faq.a: Standard within 48 hours. Priority delivery available on request.

faq.q: Is it safe to mail keys?
faq.a: Registered courier to our JB office is recommended. We log receipt the same day.

faq.q: Can inspection and key holding be bundled?
faq.a: Yes. Many overseas owners start with an inspection visit that includes key onboarding.

inspectionKeyHolding.ctaDescription: Tell us your development and unit. We confirm schedule within 24 hours.

steps.desc: Confirm development, unit details, access method, and preferred schedule.

steps.title: On-Site Visit
steps.desc: Inspector checks condition; keys logged and stored securely if required.

steps.title: Report & Custody
steps.desc: Photo report delivered remotely; keys tagged in controlled inventory.

steps.desc: Authorised key release for tenants, contractors, or further inspections.

corporateVisitServices.title: Corporate Visit Services
corporateVisitServices.subtitle: Bilingual ground support for owner and investor visits
corporateVisitServices.intro: Planning a business trip to check on your Malaysian property or explore new investments? We arrange itineraries, escort viewings, and summarise findings — so your visit is productive from day one.
corporateVisitServices.seoTitle: Corporate Property Visit Johor Bahru | Investor Escort
corporateVisitServices.seoDescription: Corporate and investor visit support in Johor Bahru, Forest City, R&F Princess Cove, and Danga Bay for overseas Chinese owners.
corporateVisitServices.seoKeywords: Johor Bahru property visit, Forest City site tour, corporate escort Malaysia
corporateVisitServices.whatsappMessage: Hi, I need Corporate Visit support for an upcoming trip to Johor Bahru.
targetCustomers: Overseas owners visiting JB for property checks or handover
Investment groups conducting due diligence on multiple units
Corporate buyers exploring Forest City or R&F portfolios
Family members travelling on behalf of elderly owners in China
scope: Pre-trip briefing and itinerary planning
Property viewing escort with bilingual support
Developer office and agent meeting coordination
Transport and timing logistics
Post-visit written summary with photos
Handoff to management or sales services if needed

pricing.name: Half-Day Escort
pricing.desc: Up to 4 hours, 2–3 site visits, local transport guidance.

pricing.name: Full-Day Escort
pricing.desc: Up to 8 hours, multiple developments, meeting coordination.

pricing.name: Multi-Day Programme
pricing.desc: 2-day itinerary across JB, Forest City, and R&F — custom quote.

faq.q: Do you only serve Chinese-speaking clients?
faq.a: We specialise in overseas Chinese owners but serve all English and Chinese-speaking visitors.

faq.q: Can you arrange airport pickup?
faq.a: Yes, as part of a custom itinerary. Transport is quoted separately based on requirements.

faq.q: Will you join meetings with developers?
faq.a: Yes. We can escort and translate during developer briefings — we are not legal advisors.

faq.q: Can visits link to MM2H planning?
faq.a: Yes. Many clients combine property tours with MM2H Landing Support consultation.

corporateVisitServices.ctaDescription: Share your travel dates and goals. We propose an itinerary within 48 hours.

mm2hLandingSupport.title: MM2H Landing Support
mm2hLandingSupport.subtitle: Practical settlement help for Malaysia My Second Home applicants
mm2hLandingSupport.intro: Approved or applying for MM2H and buying property in Johor? We help with practical landing steps — property handover, local coordination, and trusted referrals. We are not immigration agents.
mm2hLandingSupport.seoTitle: MM2H Landing Support Johor Bahru | Settlement Help
mm2hLandingSupport.seoDescription: MM2H landing and settlement support in Johor Bahru for overseas Chinese owners. Property handover, local coordination, trusted referrals.
mm2hLandingSupport.seoKeywords: MM2H Johor Bahru, Malaysia second home support, overseas Chinese MM2H
mm2hLandingSupport.whatsappMessage: Hi, I am interested in MM2H Landing Support in Johor Bahru.
targetCustomers: MM2H applicants purchasing property in JB or Forest City
New residents needing local handover and utility setup guidance
Families relocating from China, Hong Kong, or Taiwan
Owners who want one local contact during first months in Malaysia
scope: Document checklist orientation (non-legal guidance)
Property handover and inspection coordination
Bank account and utility setup introductions
Temporary accommodation suggestions
Referrals to licensed immigration consultants and lawyers
Link to ongoing property management after settlement

pricing.name: Orientation Call
pricing.desc: 60-minute briefing on landing steps and local contacts.

pricing.name: Landing Day Support
pricing.desc: Half-day escort: handover, utility intro, basic errands.

pricing.name: Settlement Package
pricing.desc: Multi-visit support over first 30 days — custom scope.

faq.q: Are you a licensed MM2H agent?
faq.a: No. We provide practical landing support and refer you to licensed immigration professionals for application matters.

faq.q: Can you help with bank account opening?
faq.a: We guide you on documents and introduce banking contacts. Approval is at the bank's discretion.

faq.q: Do you support Forest City MM2H buyers?
faq.a: Yes. We coordinate handover and local services for Forest City and JB developments.

faq.q: What happens after I settle?
faq.a: Most clients transition to Property Management or Inspection services for ongoing asset care.

propertySales.title: Property Sales
propertySales.subtitle: Sell your Johor Bahru unit with cross-border buyer reach
propertySales.intro: Ready to exit your Malaysian investment? We market your unit to local and overseas buyers, coordinate viewings, and support transaction progress — with transparent communication throughout.
propertySales.seoTitle: Sell Property Johor Bahru | Overseas Owner Sales Support
propertySales.seoDescription: Property sales support for owners in Forest City, R&F Princess Cove, Danga Bay, and Johor Bahru. Listing, viewings, and transaction coordination.
propertySales.seoKeywords: sell Forest City unit, Johor Bahru property sale, R&F resale, overseas owner exit
propertySales.whatsappMessage: Hi, I am interested in selling my property in Johor Bahru. Please share how you can help.
targetCustomers: Overseas owners who want to sell without travelling to JB repeatedly
Investors exiting Forest City, R&F, or Danga Bay holdings
Owners who need bilingual marketing to reach Chinese buyers
Landlords switching from rental to sale with minimal downtime
scope: Market analysis and pricing strategy recommendation
Professional listing and photography coordination
Buyer enquiry handling and viewing scheduling
Offer presentation and negotiation support
Lawyer and SPA progress coordination
Handover assistance and final meter readings

pricing.name: Listing Support
pricing.desc: Marketing, viewings, negotiation — standard agency model.

pricing.name: Managed Sale
pricing.desc: Full end-to-end including tenant vacation and staging advice.

pricing.name: Exclusive Mandate
pricing.desc: Dedicated campaign for premium or portfolio exits — discuss terms.

faq.q: Can you sell my unit while it is tenanted?
faq.a: Yes, with tenant coordination. Vacant units often show better — we advise case by case.

faq.q: Do you reach buyers in China?
faq.a: We market through cross-border channels alongside local listings. Results vary by price and product.

faq.q: How long does a sale typically take?
faq.a: Market dependent. Correct pricing and presentation are key — we do not guarantee a timeline.

faq.q: Are you a licensed agency?
faq.a: We work within Malaysia's agency framework and coordinate with registered professionals as required.
